title: rubus guffroyi
intro: Rubus guffroyi, also known as the French raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Rubus guffroyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Rubus guffroyi can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to support overall well-being.
